name: skizzles
description: Portable Codex harness skills, hooks, opt-in prompt policy, maintenance tooling, and bundled Container Lab runtime.

interface.shortDescription: A portable Codex harness with bundled Container Lab tooling.
interface.longDescription: Skizzles packages reusable skills, hooks, an explicit reversible prompt-policy lifecycle, maintenance tooling, and runnable Container Lab CLI/reaper bundles for a consistent Codex development environment.
defaultPrompt: Check this workspace with the Skizzles harness.
Help me use the available Skizzles skills.
